title: Batam, Riau Islands — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Batam, Riau Islands: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Batam is a city in Riau Islands with a population of 1,269,000. Riau Islands’ largest city and a fast-growing industrial hub near Singapore with a booming economy.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
